creator: karsten@photor.de
text:
Tried to update to the new version of libsndfile. I get the following output (2nd run without make clean):

cd /usr/ports/audio/libsndfile
make
..
Making all in Octave
mkoctfile -v -I../src -c  -o ./sndfile.o
mkoctfile -v -I../src ./ -L../src/.libs -L../src -lsndfile -o ./sndfile.oct
mkoctfile: unrecognized argument ./
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/libsndfile/work/libsndfile-1.0.18/Octave.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/libsndfile/work/libsndfile-1.0.18.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/libsndfile.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/libsndfile.

Octave is installed in the newest version available in the ports (octave-3.0.3_3).

How-To-Repeat: nothing special, just tried to build the port
